utils.constants.ts:
export const APP_NAME = 'Scaffinity Mobile'
export const API_URL = 'https://api.example.com'

index.js:
import { AppRegistry } from 'react-native'
import App from './App'
import { name as appName } from './app.json'

AppRegistry.registerComponent(appName, () => App)

README.md:
# Mobile App

React Native starter generated with [Scaffinity](https://github.com/devi5040/scaffinity).

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run start
```

Run `npm run android` or `npm run ios` after setting up your React Native development environment.
